title: Ametek (AME) Moves 3.7% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
text: Ametek (AME) saw its shares surge in the last session with trading volume being higher than average. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions may not translate into further price increase in the near term.

title: AMETEK (AME) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: AMETEK's (AME) third-quarter results are expected to reflect the benefits of acquisitions despite the supply-chain disruptions.

title: AMETEK Announces Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Call and Webcasted Investor Conference Call Information
text: - Earnings to be released before market opens on Tuesday, November 1, 2022 - BERWYN, Pa. , Oct. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- AMETEK, Inc. (NYSE: AME) will issue its third quarter 2022 earnings release before the market opens on Tuesday, November 1, 2022.
